nasb.text: But your wives and your little ones and your livestock (I know that you have much livestock) shall remain in your cities which I have given you,

esv.text: Only your wives, your little ones, and your livestock (I know that you have much livestock) shall remain in the cities that I have given you,

cnv.text: 只有你們的妻子、小孩子和牲畜，可以留在我賜給你們的城裡。

ccb.text: 我知道你们有许多牲畜，你们的妻子、儿女和牲畜可以留在我分给你们的城邑。
